title: LavaMiner
description: Server modpack focused on exploration, technology and fun! Built around Create 6.
body:
Based on Create 6 with add-on mods, Regions Unexplored, and YUNG's better evertyhing.

Now completely rebuild around MC 1.21.1 and NeoForge and 1.0.0 is not backwards compatible with original v0.x.y version, that is built on top of MC 1.20.1 and Forge.

Includes some optimization mods for better performance. Also included are quality of life mods like Traveller's Backpack, Waystones, JourneyMap.

Inclusdes Simple Voice Chart for voice chat with your friends.

Enjoy the fun :)
